mentions.note: Down 23% over the past year, but Cramer is a buyer, not a seller, citing confidence in CEO Rene Haas.

Very interesting; Renee Huang (CEO) got shortage coming right; great buy. CEO bet validated by chip shortage dynamics.
In every device; hesitate to exit despite weakness at $152. Rene Haas doing terrific job; long-term structural play.

CPU demand explosion from agentic AI, autonomous vehicles, robotics; 22M developer flywheel unbreakable; 50% power efficiency advantage vs. x86; data centers overtaking mobile within years; SoftBank long-only conviction; stock hasn't reflected TAM expansion.
Big beneficiary of CPU-GPU pivot for AI agents; ties tighten with Nvidia as agentic computing requires more flexible processor architectures.
